plugins.name: westland
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for Westland Construction workflows.

skills.name: schedule-best-practices
skills.description: Guide for building and maintaining construction schedules that score well on best practice metrics. Covers DCMA 14-point assessment, GAO schedule standards, and AACE recommended practices.

skills.name: schedule-quality-score
skills.description: Score a Primavera P6 schedule against industry best practice metrics and output a quality report as a Markdown file with a letter grade, scored metrics, and key findings.

skills.name: schedule-xer-generate
skills.description: Generate new Primavera P6 XER schedule files from scratch by analyzing similar project schedules and a proposal/scope document to create a proposal or baseline schedule.

skills.name: schedule-xer-read-modify
skills.description: Read, parse, analyze, and modify Primavera P6 XER schedule files. Extract activities, logic, calendars, summarize or compare schedules, and modify existing schedule data.
